LAW AND MOTION, 302, RESPONDENTS MICHELLE LEWIS, SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC ADMINISTRATOR'S OFFICE'S DEMURRER TO THE PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE RE THE ESTATE OF JOHN DAVISSON IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED AFTER THE PARTIES HAVE MET AND CONFERRED. THE PETITION WAS NOT SERVED WITH THE REQUIRED NOTICE PER CCP 1005. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: LEWIS GILLIAN , CSR NO:12355 , EMAIL: LGILLIAN@SFTC.ORG. (302)

Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RESPONDENT MICHELLE LEWIS' DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION is Off calendar. Dismissal of entire action on file as of November 28, 2017.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Oct-19-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT MICHELLE LEWIS, SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC ADMINISTRATOR'S OFFICE DEMURRER TO VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE

Respondents' demurrer to the petition for writ of mandate re the estate of John Davisson is off calendar without prejudice to being refiled after the parties have met and conferred. The petition was not served with the required notice per CCP 1005. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian , CSR No:12355 , email: lgillian@sftc.org. (D302)
